name: Quebec Poached Salmon
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------
SAUCE VERTE (GREEN SAUCE)
1. Spread the oil in a frying pan or baking dish.
2. Place the salmon steaks next to one another, but not overlapping.
3. Add the lemon juice and peel, peppercorns, salt, onion pieces, and just enough hot water to cover the fish.
4. Cover and poach over low heat on top of the stove for 10-12 minutes, or in a 325°F oven in the baking dish for the same length of time, or until the salmon flakes.
5. Allow the fish to cool in the liquid. Drain well and remove the skin.
6. Arrange on a platter.
7. Prepare Sauce Verte:
- Chop the vegetables coarsely (green onion tops/spinach/green pepper) and put them in a blender with lemon juice.
- Cover and blend until it becomes a mushy mixture with small bits of ingredients.
- Add mayonnaise and blend again.
- If you don't have a blender, chop the ingredients very finely and mix them into the mayonnaise with lemon juice, crushing as much as possible for color.
From the author: Use salmon steaks for this colorful and tasty dish. It is easy to make it for 2 or 10 people.
